prompt: Create a clean, wide 3:2 photorealistic editorial product photograph for a practical guide to using the real IKEA KLIPPBOK water leak sensor with Home Assistant. Use the first supplied official image as the strict product-identity reference, the second as the strict installed-context and scale reference, and the third for warm residential mood only. Show one authentic KLIPPBOK lying flat on a pale stone or tile floor beside a white front-loading washing machine in a tidy real laundry room with warm oak, natural materials, and one restrained dark-green fabric accent. Preserve the exact compact off-white rounded-rectangle body, proportions, pinhole, circular speaker-hole pattern, seam, scale, and material; do not redesign or duplicate it. Keep the product prominent in the lower-center foreground and large enough for both 16:10 article and 16:9 card crops. No person, phone, text, logo, watermark, UI, diagram, chart, routing line, translucent panel, inset frame, floating card, progress bar, extra hardware, or water puddle.
